description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden sideboard cabinet with a dark blue painted body and a contrasting natural wood top. The front features three panel doors, each with a round knob, and three drawers above, each with a small pull handle. The sides are solid and paneled, matching the front's style, while the back is plain wood, unpainted, and lacks any hardware. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy legs and has a robust, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or communal spaces. The wood grain on the top is visible and adds a touch of warmth to the otherwise industrial look. The overall construction suggests durability and ample storage capacity.
description: A large, dark blue wooden sideboard cabinet with a natural wood top, three front doors, and three drawers, featuring sturdy construction and ample storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three panel doors with knobs and three drawers with pull handles, all painted dark blue with a natural wood top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, paneled blue side and the thickness of the natural wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing an unpainted, plain wood back with no hardware or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the blue paneled side and wood top.
